headline: A Look At Tyler Technologies (TYL) Valuation After Michigan Contract Win And US$200 Million Buyback Authorization
summary: Tyler Technologies (TYL) has drawn fresh investor attention after securing a multi county public safety software deployment in Michigan and authorizing a $200 million share repurchase, combining contract momentum with direct capital returns to shareholders. See our latest analysis for Tyler Technologies. Despite the new multi county public safety contract and the fresh US$200 million share repurchase authorization, Tyler Technologies’ share price has had a weaker patch, with a 30 day share...
